creator: fbsd1@a1poweruser.com
text:
Currently /usr/local/etc/periodic/monthly/300.ststistics file is the main workhorse of the bsdstats port. When executing "locate bsdstats" this file is not listed. The correct path for this file should be
/usr/local/etc/bsdstats/periodic/monthly/300.ststistics
and as such would be listed with the other bsdstats files during locate command.

Fix: 

The appropriate changes need to be done to the port by the port maintainer
